testcase.name: test_youtube_search_functionality

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("input#search").first

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:25: in test_youtube_search_functionality page.locator("input#search").first.fill("Los Angeles Lakers") ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15983: in fill self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:215: in fill return await self._frame.fill(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:607: in fill await self._fill(**locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:619: in _fill await self._channel.send("fill", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for locator("input#search").first

testcase.name: test_youtube_navigate_subscriptions

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token ""Subscriptions"" while parsing css selector "a\[title\="Subscriptions"\]". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - waiting for a\[title\="Subscriptions"\] >> nth=0

testcase.name: test_TC_Authentication_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('accounts\\.google\\.com/ServiceLogin')' Actual value: https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fresults%253Fsearch_query%253Dlos%252Bangeles%252Blakers&dsh=S1040214253%3A1772604028532615&ec=65620&hl=en&ifkv=ASfE1-rBFc5lN6BEVHTk7FxEy0z1w1p6lOichy8I0CKlSyLxqUjNG4XLcjQZxYQCx8Her9nZhgx61Q&passive=true&service=youtube&uilel=3&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&flowEntry=ServiceLogin Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 8 × unexpected value "https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fresults%253Fsearch_query%253Dlos%252Bangeles%252Blakers&dsh=S1040214253%3A1772604028532615&ec=65620&hl=en&ifkv=ASfE1-rBFc5lN6BEVHTk7FxEy0z1w1p6lOichy8I0CKlSyLxqUjNG4XLcjQZxYQCx8Her9nZhgx61Q&passive=true&service=youtube&uilel=3&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&flowEntry=ServiceLogin"

testcase.failure: tests/page_1_cdbd/test_page_1_cdbd.py:47: in test_TC_Authentication_01 expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"accounts\.google\.com/ServiceLogin")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('accounts\\.google\\.com/ServiceLogin')' E Actual value: https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fresults%253Fsearch_query%253Dlos%252Bangeles%252Blakers&dsh=S1040214253%3A1772604028532615&ec=65620&hl=en&ifkv=ASfE1-rBFc5lN6BEVHTk7FxEy0z1w1p6lOichy8I0CKlSyLxqUjNG4XLcjQZxYQCx8Her9nZhgx61Q&passive=true&service=youtube&uilel=3&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&flowEntry=ServiceLogin E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 8 × unexpected value "https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtrue%26app%3Ddesktop%26hl%3Den%26next%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.youtube.com%252Fresults%253Fsearch_query%253Dlos%252Bangeles%252Blakers&dsh=S1040214253%3A1772604028532615&ec=65620&hl=en&ifkv=ASfE1-rBFc5lN6BEVHTk7FxEy0z1w1p6lOichy8I0CKlSyLxqUjNG4XLcjQZxYQCx8Her9nZhgx61Q&passive=true&service=youtube&uilel=3&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&flowEntry=ServiceLogin"

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/shorts/')' Actual value: https://www.youtube.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 8 × unexpected value "https://www.youtube.com/"

testcase.failure: tests/page_2_f871/test_page_2_f871.py:23: in test_TC_Navigation_02 expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"/shorts/")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/shorts/')' E Actual value: https://www.youtube.com/ E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 8 × unexpected value "https://www.youtube.com/"

testcase.name: test_TC_ContentVerification_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 'I post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...more' Actual value: I post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...moreI post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...more...more Call log: - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("yt-description-preview-view-model.ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelHost.yt-page-header-view-model__page-header-description.ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelClickable").first 8 × locator resolved to <yt-description-preview-view-model class="ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelHost yt-page-header-view-model__page-header-description ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelClickable">…</yt-description-preview-view-model> - unexpected value "I post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...moreI post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...more...more"

testcase.failure: tests/page_2_f871/test_page_2_f871.py:34: in test_TC_ContentVerification_01 expect(page.locator("yt-description-preview-view-model.ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelHost.yt-page-header-view-model__page-header-description.ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelClickable").first).to_have_text("I post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...more") E AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 'I post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...more' E Actual value: I post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...moreI post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...more...more E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for locator("yt-description-preview-view-model.ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelHost.yt-page-header-view-model__page-header-description.ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelClickable").first E 8 × locator resolved to <yt-description-preview-view-model class="ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelHost yt-page-header-view-model__page-header-description ytDescriptionPreviewViewModelClickable">…</yt-description-preview-view-model> E - unexpected value "I post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...moreI post highlights from the biggest flex moments on the internet. ...more...more"

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("#endpoint").first - locator resolved to … - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 55 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms

E Call log: E - waiting for locator("#endpoint").first E - locator resolved to … E - attempting click action E 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable E - element is not visible E - retrying click action E - waiting 20ms E 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable E - element is not visible E - retrying click action E - waiting 100ms E 55 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable E - element is not visible E - retrying click action E - waiting 500ms

testcase.name: test_TC_Tabs_07

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("//button[contains(text(), \"Live\")]") - locator resolved to <button class="ytp-live-badge ytp-button">Live</button> - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 50 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms

testcase.name: test_TC_VideoLink_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/watch\\?v=tkXaappAotk&pp=ygUSbG9zIGFuZ2VsZXMgbGFrZXJz')' Actual value: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tkXaappAotk Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 8 × unexpected value "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tkXaappAotk"

testcase.failure: tests/page_4_2b0a/test_page_4_2b0a.py:102: in test_TC_VideoLink_01 expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"/watch\?v=tkXaappAotk&pp=ygUSbG9zIGFuZ2VsZXMgbGFrZXJz")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/watch\\?v=tkXaappAotk&pp=ygUSbG9zIGFuZ2VsZXMgbGFrZXJz')' E Actual value: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tkXaappAotk E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 8 × unexpected value "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tkXaappAotk"
